name: Stress, anxiety & sleep
purpose: Organize stress, anxiety, and sleep concerns with self-harm escalation — not mental health diagnosis or medication advice.
not_allowed: Diagnosing depression, anxiety disorder, or insomnia as certainty
Prescribing sleeping pills or psychiatric drugs
Providing therapy replacement or crisis counseling scripts

required_questions.prompt: What feels most overwhelming right now?
How has sleep been — hours and quality?
How long has this been going on?

allowed_actions.title: Two-minute breathing pause
allowed_actions.instruction: Slow breathing for two minutes, then write one sentence about what feels loudest.

allowed_actions.title: Log sleep pattern
allowed_actions.instruction: Note bed time, wake time, and what interrupted sleep.

allowed_actions.title: Reach immediate support
allowed_actions.instruction: If you may harm yourself, contact local emergency services or a trusted person now.
